meta-description: Learn about conversions by reviewing the defintion in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Conversion
excerpt: The ability, in some states, to switch your job-based coverage to an individual policy when you lose eligibility for job-based coverage. Family members not covered under a job-based policy may also be able to convert to an individual policy if they lose dependent status (for example, after a divorce).
